notableEvents.label: Luke Keaschall plunked
notableEvents.detail: Twins challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Luke Keaschall hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Marlins challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Trevor Larnach steals (2) 2nd base. Byron Buxton steals (4) home.

notableEvents.label: Kody Clemens GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Liam Hicks. Luke Keaschall out at 2nd. Kody Clemens out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach strikes out swinging. Wild pitch by pitcher Eury Pérez. Trevor Larnach advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by catcher Joe Mack.
